description: An observatory calibration scientist is preparing the telescope for a high-precision photometry run. Measure the V-band atmospheric extinction coefficient by observing standard stars from the candidate list at ~/Documents/extinction_targets.txt. Select exactly 4 distinct stars from the list with an altitude greater than 20 degrees. For each star, capture three 5-second LIGHT frames in the V-band filter, saving them to individual subdirectories at ~/Images/extinction/<Star_Name>/. Create a summary report at ~/Documents/extinction_report.txt listing the 4 stars, their measured altitudes, and their calculated airmasses (Airmass = 1 / sin(Altitude)).
